text: Any highway providing access between a qualifying highway, as defined in § 134-A (Qualifying highway) , and terminals, facilities for food, fuel, repairs, and rest and, in addition, for points of loading and unloading for household goods carriers as such highways are designated by the commissioner of transportation pursuant to § 1627 (Designation of qualifying highways and access highways) .

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 100-A — Access highway

Any highway providing access between a qualifying highway, as defined in § 134-A (Qualifying highway) , and terminals, facilities for food, fuel, repairs, and rest and, in addition, for points of loading and unloading for household goods carriers as such highways are designated by the commissioner of transportation pursuant to § 1627 (Designation of qualifying highways and access highways) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
